scenarios.capability: Tag routing validation: detecting unmatched INPUT tags that cause silent log loss
scenarios.reason: Agent reads config text and traces tag patterns through Match fields — no runtime Fluent Bit execution required

scenarios.capability: Security audit: hardcoded credentials and tls.verify Off in production output plugins
scenarios.reason: Agent scans config text for plaintext values and TLS settings — entirely static text analysis

scenarios.capability: Performance analysis: missing Mem_Buf_Limit, flush interval, and storage configuration
scenarios.reason: Agent checks specific performance-related fields in config sections — static analysis only

scenarios.capability: Structure validation: required fields, valid plugin names, and malformed section syntax
scenarios.reason: Agent validates config syntax and required parameters from text — no binary execution needed

scenarios.capability: Full validation workflow: multi-stage check, severity categorization, fix proposal, and completion summary
scenarios.reason: Agent performs end-to-end validation analysis and produces a structured report with proposed fixes — no runtime tools required
